steps.title: Spot the hidden intention beneath the surface fact
steps.content: The passage states the letter was addressed to a merchant, then pivots with “though” to Bolívar's goal of persuading political leaders. The transition must mark the movement from what's explicit to what's truly intended.

steps.title: Apply the word for deeper purpose
steps.content:
”Ultimately” means “when you get down to it” or “the real story”—precisely what's needed to reveal true intention beneath surface facts.

The other options express addition (additionally) or causation (accordingly, consequently), neither of which conveys the movement from what's shown to what's real.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
